description:
A customer service representative at GardenWorld has received a phone call from business partner 'Joe Block' reporting a quality issue. Create a formal service request in iDempiere to track this complaint with the following details:

- Request Type: First available option
- Summary: 'Paint peeling on outdoor furniture - customer requests replacement'
- Business Partner: 'Joe Block'
- Priority: High
- Confidentiality: Customer Confidential
- Due Type: Due
- Description: 'Customer Joe Block called to report that the paint on the outdoor furniture set delivered two weeks ago is peeling off. Multiple pieces affected. Customer is requesting full replacement under warranty.'
